node_kinds.name: Okta_Device
node_kinds.description: A device registered in Okta, such as a mobile phone or a computer

node_kinds.name: Okta_Application
node_kinds.description: An application registered in Okta, such as a SAML app or an OIDC app

node_kinds.name: Okta_ResourceSet
node_kinds.description: A resource set containing users, groups, applications, and other Okta objects

node_kinds.name: Okta_Role
node_kinds.description: A built-in role in Okta, such as Super Admin or Group Admin

node_kinds.name: Okta_CustomRole
node_kinds.description: A custom role in Okta created by an administrator

node_kinds.name: Okta_RoleAssignment
node_kinds.description: A set of permissions assigned to a user, group, or an application in Okta

node_kinds.name: Okta_ApiToken
node_kinds.description: A secret used by users to authenticate to the Okta API

node_kinds.name: Okta_ClientSecret
node_kinds.description: A secret used by applications to authenticate to the Okta API

node_kinds.name: Okta_AgentPool
node_kinds.description: A pool of synchronization or authentication agents in Okta

node_kinds.name: Okta_Agent
node_kinds.description: A synchronization or authentication agent in Okta

node_kinds.name: Okta_IdentityProvider
node_kinds.description: An identity provider trusted by Okta for authentication

node_kinds.name: Okta_Policy
node_kinds.description: A policy defining rules for authentication, password, or other features in Okta

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_Contains
relationship_kinds.description: Contains relationship between the Okta organization and its objects

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_RealmContains
relationship_kinds.description: Contains relationship between an Okta realm and its users

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ManagerOf
relationship_kinds.description: Manager relationship between Okta users

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_DeviceOf
relationship_kinds.description: Ownership relationship between a device and its assigned user

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ApiTokenFor
relationship_kinds.description: User ownership of an Okta API token

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_SecretOf
relationship_kinds.description: Client secret associated with an application or service integration

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_KeyOf
relationship_kinds.description: JSON Web Key associated with an Okta application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_AgentMemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: Membership of an Okta agent in an agent pool

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_AgentPoolFor
relationship_kinds.description: Relationship between an AD agent pool and its backing AD application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_KerberosSSO
relationship_kinds.description: Agentless desktop SSO relationship from on-prem AD user account to Okta AD application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_HostsAgent
relationship_kinds.description: Relationship between an AD server and the Okta agent running on that host

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_CreatorOf
relationship_kinds.description: Creator relationship for API service integrations

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_AppAssignment
relationship_kinds.description: Assignment of users or groups to an Okta application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ReadPasswordUpdates
relationship_kinds.description: Application can read password updates over the SCIM protocol

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ReadClientSecret
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to read client secrets for scoped Okta applications

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ResourceSetContains
relationship_kinds.description: Membership of objects within an Okta resource set

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_MemberOf
relationship_kinds.description: Membership of a user in an Okta group

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_HasRole
relationship_kinds.description: Assignment of a built-in or custom role to a principal

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ResetPassword
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to reset passwords or temporary credentials for scoped Okta users

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ResetFactors
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to reset MFA factors for scoped Okta users

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_AddMember
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to add or remove members in scoped Okta groups

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ManageApp
relationship_kinds.description: Ability to manage scoped Okta applications

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_HasRoleAssignment
relationship_kinds.description: Relationship between a principal and a role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_ScopedTo
relationship_kinds.description: Scope relationship between a role assignment and its target

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_AppAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Application administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_GroupAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Group administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_GroupMembershipAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Group membership administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_HelpDeskAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Help desk administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_SuperAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Super administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_OrgAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Organization administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_MobileAdmin
relationship_kinds.description: Mobile administrator role assignment

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_IdentityProviderFor
relationship_kinds.description: Trust relationship between an identity provider and Okta users

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_IdpGroupAssignment
relationship_kinds.description: Identity provider group assignment to an Okta group

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_GroupPush
relationship_kinds.description: Provisioning of group memberships to an external application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_GroupPull
relationship_kinds.description: Import of group memberships from an external application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_UserPush
relationship_kinds.description: Provisioning of users to an external application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_UserPull
relationship_kinds.description: Import of users from an external application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_PolicyMapping
relationship_kinds.description: Association of a policy with an Okta application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_UserSync
relationship_kinds.description: Bidirectional synchronization between Okta users and external identities

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_PasswordSync
relationship_kinds.description: Password synchronization between user accounts via AD integration, Org2Org, or SCIM

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_MembershipSync
relationship_kinds.description: Bidirectional synchronization between Okta groups and external groups

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_OutboundSSO
relationship_kinds.description: Single sign-on from Okta to an external identity provider

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_SWA
relationship_kinds.description: Secure Web Authentication from Okta to an external application

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_OutboundOrgSSO
relationship_kinds.description: Single sign-on from an Okta application to an external organization

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_OrgSWA
relationship_kinds.description: Secure Web Authentication from an Okta application to an external organization

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_InboundOrgSSO
relationship_kinds.description: Single sign-on from an external organization into Okta

relationship_kinds.name: Okta_InboundSSO
relationship_kinds.description: Single sign-on from an external identity provider into Okta
